positive: Minimalist abstract geometric mountain range silhouette, rising dramatically from a stylized horizon line. The palette is limited to deep indigo, muted sage green, and vibrant sunset coral. The composition must be highly symmetrical, featuring strong negative space and clean lines, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Stylized vector art look, clean silhouette, negative space emphasis, high contrast, flat design, concept art, trending on Behance.
